title: 8 Redeeming Government of Canada and Canada Savings Bonds Coupons
body_text:
8	Redeeming Government of Canada and Canada Savings Bonds Coupons
8.1	Determining the Redemption Requirements
Coupons can be submitted for redemption on or after the Maturity Date printed on the Coupon. Refer to the following table for redemption requirements.
Coupon Type
Redeeming Loose Coupons
Redeeming Coupons with Bond
Government of Canada Coupons
Redeem on or after Maturity Date on Coupon
Value = amount printed on Coupon
Refer to this Chapter
Remove all matured Coupons and redeem separately as loose Coupons.
Refer to Chapter 7, Redeeming Marketable Bonds (Government of Canada Bonds and Treasury Bills) at Maturity.
Canada Savings Bond Coupons
(old series 1√¢¬Ä¬ì31)
Redeem only if bond not presented
Redeem on demand √¢¬Ä¬ì Coupons are all matured
Value is printed on Coupon
Refer to this Chapter
All unredeemed Coupons MUST remain attached to the bond
Refer to Chapter 6, Redeeming Coupon, Fully Registered, and Special Fully Registered Canada Savings Bonds (Series 1√¢¬Ä¬ì31)
8.2	Processing Coupons
To redeem Government of Canada issued Coupons, proceed as follows.
1.
Cut each Coupon individually.
2.
Stamp each Coupon on the back with the credit union√¢¬Ä¬ôs Endorsement Stamp. Do not stamp the face of the Coupon as some Coupons bear machine readable numbers.
3.
Complete a T600 Tax Form for Coupon interest if the amount of Coupon interest exceeds $5.00.
4.
Sort loose Coupons by each denomination.
5.
Prepare two envelopes, one for denominations lower than $500.01 and one for denominations over $500.
6.
On each envelope, list the denominations in sequence with the lowest amount first as follows:
Number of Coupons in each denomination
The value of each Coupon denomination (pre-printed on the Coupon)
The total amount of each denomination (number of Coupons multiplied by the Coupon value)
The total number of Coupons enclosed
The total dollar amount of the Coupons enclosed
Important
:	For old-style Coupons that have blocks A, B, and C, the block of Coupons must be intact to receive credit for a specific block of Coupons. The C Coupon is only valid when presented with a complete intact set of block A and B Coupons.
See Section 9.2, Preparing the Deposit for Central 1, for further information.
END
